productDisplayName: Aneri Women Kaalki Multi Coloured Kurta
description: Composition Multi-coloured kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round slit neck, embroidery on the chest, panel stitch on the neckline, chest and cuffs, patterning all over and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash in cold water Dry clean only Classic patterning on contemporary styles by aneri creates this kurta for women. Timelessly chic, this piece will never go out of style. Wear it with tonal leggings and pumps for ethnic glam or with form fitting denims and flats for a casual do. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
